title: Diabetes Type 2 intake starter
questions: What was your latest fasting or post-meal sugar reading, if you track it?
Which medicines has your doctor prescribed, if any?
What time do you usually eat breakfast, lunch, and dinner?
Have you had dizziness, sweating, confusion, vomiting, or extreme weakness recently?

title: Blood pressure intake starter
questions: What was your latest BP reading and when was it measured?
Were you sitting and resting before the reading?
Are you taking any BP medicine prescribed by a doctor?
Do you have chest pain, severe headache, breathlessness, weakness, or confusion?

title: Weight management intake starter
questions: What is your current weight and goal weight?
What do you usually eat for breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks?
Do cravings happen more at night, during stress, or after long gaps?
What activity can you realistically do this week?
